chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 97 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 14.04.2023 For orders on MA 616/23 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 539/23 For hearing of main case Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Mangrio, Advocate along with Petitioners The petitioners are present along with their counsel. Per learned the Petitioner No.1 after embracing Islam has contracted marriage with Petitioner No.2 out of her own freewill, choice and without any pressure or coercion which caused annoyance her parents and the concerned police at their behest is causing harassment to them. Petitioner No.1 present in person confirms that neither she has been abducted nor enticed, but she after embracing Islam has contracted marriage with Petitioner No.2 with her own free will and without any fear or force. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, learned A.P.G. present in court in other matters waives notice and submits that the concerned police will act as per law and shall provide legal protection to the petitioners. Being satisfied with the above statement of learned A.P.G. counsel for petitioner does not press the instant petition. Since the issue is with regard to legal protection as such, the instant petition is disposed with direction to the concerned SHO to act as per law and provide legal protection to the petitioners as and when they approach him for such legal protection. Let a copy of this order be communicated to SSP concerned for compliance. JUDGE Karar_hussain/PS*
